title: Milestone Camping Electric Air Pump High Power with 3 Nozzles/British Brand & Safety Certificates/Airbeds Inflatable Mattresses Paddling Pools Balls / 3 Nozzles
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: ELECTRIC AIR PUMP – This electric air pump delivers a simple way to inflate or deflate airbeds, mattresses, inflatable toys, paddling pools, and any other inflatable products.
INCLUDES 3 NOZZLES – The air pump comes complete with 3 different sized nozzles that simply attach to the main body of the unit and will suit all standard valve fittings.
MULTI-FUNCTIONAL – This portable electric air pump can be used in a number of different places such as at festivals and on camping trips, for back garden pool parties, or generally around the home.
PORTABLE & LIGHTWEIGHT – The air pump can be transported anywhere with great ease thanks to its lightweight stature. The power source is AC220V-240V 130W 50Hz.

MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. From tents and sleeping bags, to chairs and camp cutlery, visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Powerful & Customisable Corded Electric Air Pump Ensure all your inflatables are ready as quickly as possible using this effective Electric Air Pump. Its simple, lightweight design helps it to save space and makes it easy to transport. The pump is powered by a traditional electric cord, with an AC220V-240V power source, ensuring you can rapidly inflate beach balls, pool rings, and more. Previous page Quick Process Simply attach the pump's nozzle to the port, switch the pump on, and it'll do the rest of the work. 3 Nozzles Included 3 differently sized nozzles are included to suit all kinds of valves on different inflatable items. Inflate and Deflate The pump features two ports, to help you both inflate and deflate items with ease. Portable for Travel Weighing less than 1 KG, the pump is ideal for use at home, festivals, campsites, and in campervans. Next page 1 Quick Process 2 3 Nozzles Included 3 Inflate and Deflate 4 Portable for Travel
